meta.scope: These Terms apply to all current and future systems, features, APIs, integrations, support channels, websites, applications, authentication systems, bots, and related services operated under the platform.
meta.userResponsibility: Users are fully responsible for their accounts, linked services, devices, sessions, credentials, and all activity associated with their usage of the service.
meta.staffDiscretion: Moderation, enforcement, support, restrictions, approvals, and operational decisions are made at staff discretion and may occur with or without notice.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: By accessing or using any part of the service, you agree to these Terms of Service and all related policies, guidelines, and platform rules.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
content: By using the service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms.
If you do not agree to these Terms, you must discontinue use immediately.
Continued use of the service after updates constitutes acceptance of revised Terms.

sections.title: Eligibility and Age Requirements
content: You must comply with all applicable laws and minimum age requirements in your jurisdiction.
If you are under the age of majority in your region, you confirm that you have parental or guardian permission to use the service.
We are not responsible for unauthorized use by minors.

sections.title: Account Responsibility
content: You are responsible for maintaining the security and confidentiality of your credentials, sessions, tokens, linked accounts, and authentication methods.
All activity performed through your account is considered your responsibility regardless of authorization status.
Sharing, transferring, selling, leasing, or trading accounts without authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: Authentication and Recovery
content: Account recovery is not guaranteed.
Recovery requests may require identity verification through linked services or additional information.
Failure to maintain access to linked authentication methods may result in permanent loss of account access.

sections.title: Email and Two-Factor Authentication
content: You are responsible for maintaining access to any email used for verification or security purposes.
You are responsible for keeping any two-factor authentication methods secure and accessible.
We are not responsible for delays, delivery failures, or loss of access to verification messages or codes.

sections.title: Usernames and Identity
content: You agree not to use usernames that are misleading, offensive, impersonating, or otherwise disruptive.
We reserve the right to change, restrict, or remove usernames at any time when necessary.
Identity-related data such as usernames, IDs, and linked accounts may be displayed, stored, or processed as part of the service.

sections.title: Linked Accounts and Dependencies
content: Certain features may depend on linking external accounts, including but not limited to Discord, Roblox, email, or other services.
You are responsible for ensuring linked accounts remain valid, accessible, and correctly connected.
Failure to maintain linked accounts may result in loss of functionality, rewards, or support eligibility.

sections.title: Data Visibility and Accuracy
content: Certain account data may be visible to other users or staff, including but not limited to IDs, statistics, and profile information.
Displayed data may be delayed, cached, or temporarily inconsistent with backend records.
Backend records shall take precedence over any displayed values.

sections.title: Rewards, Virtual Items, and Features
content: All rewards, balances, currencies, quests, virtual items, and features are provided on an as-available basis and are not guaranteed.
We may modify, suspend, limit, remove, correct, or cancel any reward or feature at any time.
No virtual item, balance, or reward constitutes real-world property, ownership, or financial entitlement.

sections.title: Support and Communication
content: Support may be provided through multiple channels, including but not limited to Discord, website tickets, email, or in-platform tools.
Submitting a request does not guarantee a response, resolution, or outcome.
Support responses may be incomplete, delayed, inconsistent, or unofficial unless explicitly stated otherwise.

sections.title: Tickets and Appeals
content: All tickets and appeals are subject to review by staff.
Staff may close, delay, escalate, deny, or ignore requests at their discretion.
Appeals are not guaranteed and may be denied without explanation.

sections.title: Logging and Monitoring
content: All actions may be logged, including but not limited to login attempts, interactions, support activity, and moderation events.
Logs may be reviewed for moderation, security, fraud prevention, or operational purposes.
You consent to the logging and review of activity where permitted by law.

sections.title: Analytics and Tracking
content: The service may collect analytics, interaction data, performance metrics, device information, cookies, session data, and usage statistics.
Data may be processed automatically or by third-party providers for operational, security, development, or analytical purposes.
The service may use fingerprinting or similar technologies where allowed by law and disclosed where required.

sections.title: Security Responsibility
content: You are responsible for securing your account, devices, browser sessions, and connected services.
We are not responsible for unauthorized access resulting from poor device security, shared devices, or compromised credentials.
Security checks, challenges, or verification steps may be required at any time.

sections.title: IP Addresses and Device Information
content: We may store IP addresses, device identifiers, and related metadata for security and abuse prevention.
Device, network, browser, or fingerprint-based restrictions may be used to prevent abuse or protect the service.
Use of VPNs, proxies, emulators, or similar technologies may be restricted where necessary.

sections.title: Automation and Rate Limiting
content: Automated systems including queues, cooldowns, rate limits, verification systems, and anti-abuse protections may restrict or delay access.
Attempting to bypass automated protections may result in immediate restrictions or permanent bans.
We are not responsible for delays or failed actions caused by these protections.

sections.title: Exploits and Abuse
content: You may not exploit bugs, automate actions, bypass safeguards, or manipulate systems.
Unauthorized reverse engineering, scraping, packet inspection, interference, or tampering is prohibited.
Any abuse may result in removal of rewards, restrictions, account resets, or permanent bans.

sections.title: Alternate Accounts
content: Use of alternate accounts to gain advantage, evade enforcement, or bypass restrictions is prohibited.
We may restrict, review, or ban related accounts or associated entities when abuse is detected.

sections.title: Prohibited Conduct
list: Attempting unauthorized access to systems or data
Bypassing or attempting to bypass safeguards

sections.title: Bans and Enforcement
content: Accounts may be restricted or banned for violations or for reasons deemed necessary by staff.
Bans may be temporary or permanent.
Enforcement may apply across related accounts, devices, sessions, or IPs where appropriate.

sections.title: Service Availability
content: The service may be unavailable at any time due to maintenance, updates, outages, or unforeseen issues.
We are not responsible for downtime, interruptions, or loss of access.
There is no guarantee of uninterrupted or error-free operation.

sections.title: Feature Modifications
content: We reserve the right to modify, remove, test, disable, migrate, or replace any feature at any time.
Changes may affect functionality, availability, compatibility, or access.
Experimental, beta, or preview systems may contain bugs or unexpected behavior.

sections.title: External Links and Third-Party Services
content: The service may contain links to external websites, services, or content.
We are not responsible for third-party content, availability, policies, actions, or damages arising from external sites.
Third-party services, APIs, hosting, email systems, and integrations may be used at times and are outside our direct control.

sections.title: Content and User Submissions
content: Messages, attachments, uploaded media, usernames, support content, and other submissions may be stored, processed, reviewed, logged, or displayed for operational or moderation purposes.
You are solely responsible for all content you submit or share through the service.
We may remove, preserve, modify, archive, or delete submitted content at any time without notice.

sections.title: Public Information and Archiving
content: Publicly visible data, metadata, usernames, timestamps, identifiers, or activity information may be indexed, archived, mirrored, or stored by third parties.
Deleted or modified content may remain in caches, backups, archives, or search indexes outside our control.

sections.title: No Warranty
content: The service is provided on an as-is and as-available basis without warranties of any kind.
We disclaim warranties of reliability, fitness for a particular purpose, compatibility, security, and availability.
Use of the service is entirely at your own risk.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for damages, losses, or issues arising from use of the service.
This includes direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages.
Where liability cannot be excluded by law, it will be limited to the minimum amount required by applicable law.

sections.title: No Guarantees
content: We make no guarantees regarding rewards, outcomes, support, availability, data retention, or account permanence.
Past behavior, prior outcomes, or historical functionality do not guarantee future results.

sections.title: No Professional Advice
content: Nothing provided through the service constitutes legal, financial, technical, medical, or other professional advice.
Any guidance, moderation response, or support message is provided for informational purposes only.

sections.title: Service Changes and Continuity
content: The service may change, rebrand, merge, reset, discontinue, or cease operations at any time.
We are not responsible for loss of access, progress, or data caused by such changes.
No expectation of continued service or permanent availability is created by use of the platform.

sections.title: Refunds and Compensation
content: All purchases, rewards, virtual balances, promotional items, or granted benefits are final unless explicitly stated otherwise.
We are not obligated to provide refunds, reimbursements, replacements, or compensation for downtime, restrictions, feature removals, lost access, moderation actions, or user dissatisfaction.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
content: All branding, systems, interfaces, graphics, layouts, code, text, designs, and original service content remain the property of the service or its licensors unless otherwise stated.
You may not copy, redistribute, reverse engineer, reproduce, scrape, or commercially exploit any part of the service without permission.

sections.title: Termination of Access
content: We may suspend, terminate, restrict, or permanently revoke access to the service at any time, with or without notice.
Termination may occur automatically or manually for security, moderation, operational, legal, or discretionary reasons.

sections.title: Indemnification
content: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the service, owners, developers, staff, moderators, affiliates, and contributors from claims, liabilities, damages, losses, expenses, disputes, and legal costs arising from your use of the service or violation of these Terms.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
content: Any dispute arising from the service may be resolved through the dispute process chosen by the service operators where permitted by law.
Users waive the right to bring collective or representative claims to the extent allowed by law.
Any jury trial waiver, arbitration clause, or venue provision applies only to the extent enforceable in your jurisdiction.

sections.title: Governing Law
content: These Terms shall be interpreted in accordance with the laws selected by the service operators, to the extent permitted by law.
If any provision is unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in effect.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
content: These Terms may be updated at any time.
Continued use of the service after updates constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
The most recent published version governs your use of the service.

sections.title: Entire Agreement
content: These Terms, together with any incorporated policies or rules, constitute the entire agreement between users and the service regarding use of the platform.

sections.title: Contact and Notices
content: Official notices may be delivered through the service, email, Discord, support systems, or other contact methods we make available.
Electronic communications may satisfy any legal requirement that notices be in writing where permitted by law.

cards.title: Account Recovery
cards.content: Account recovery is not guaranteed and may require verification.

cards.title: Support Records
cards.content: Support interactions may be logged, stored, and reviewed.

extras.footer: These Terms apply to all current and future features. Continued use constitutes acceptance of all provisions.
